description_long: This is a tall, rectangular stone obelisk with a weathered, gray surface and visible engraved inscriptions in Japanese kanji on multiple sides. The obelisk stands on a multi-tiered stone base, which is composed of several stacked rectangular blocks, some of which show signs of aging and moss growth. At the front, there are two small metallic fixtures and a recessed area, possibly for offerings or ritual use, flanked by a low stone curb. The inscriptions are deeply carved and appear to be commemorative, with the main text facing the front. The overall structure is solid and monolithic, with no visible ornamentation apart from the inscriptions. The setting suggests it is a memorial or grave marker, commonly found in Japanese cemeteries or temple grounds.
description: A tall, weathered stone obelisk with Japanese inscriptions, set on a multi-tiered stone base with small metallic fixtures at the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main inscription, two metallic fixtures, and a recessed area at the base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the layered stone base and a secondary inscription, with one metallic fixture visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a vertical inscription and the plain, blocky structure of the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with another inscription and a clear view of the stone layering and metallic fixture.
attribute_inscription: Deeply engraved Japanese kanji inscriptions are present on all four sides of the obelisk, with the most prominent and legible text on the front face. The inscriptions are vertical, traditional in style, and appear to be commemorative.
attribute_base_design: The base consists of several stacked rectangular stone blocks forming a stepped platform. The front features a recessed area and two small metallic fixtures, possibly for ritual offerings, with some moss and weathering visible.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat and unadorned, maintaining the rectangular cross-section of the shaft with no decorative elements.
attribute_surrounding_features: A paved stone platform surrounds the base, with no additional features such as fences, statues, or vegetation immediately adjacent.
